mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_application_list(user_id, program_id, status_code, note_text) VALUES(#{userId}, #{programId}, #{statusCode}, #{noteText}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status_code = VALUES(status_code), note_text = VALUES(note_text), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS application_id, a.status_code, a.note_text, p.id AS program_id, p.school_id, p.program_name, p.college_name, p.degree_type, p.subject_category_code, p.subject_category_name, p.direction_code, p.direction_name, p.study_mode, p.duration_months, p.tuition_amount, p.tuition_currency, p.language_type, p.language_min_score, p.gpa_min_recommend, p.requires_gre, p.requires_gmat, p.background_preference, p.application_rounds_overview, p.suitable_tags, p.intake_term, p.program_summary, s.school_name_cn, s.school_name_en, s.country_code, s.country_name, s.qs_rank FROM student_application_list a INNER JOIN program p ON p.id = a.program_id INNER JOIN school s ON s.id = p.school_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.qs_rank ASC, p.id ASC
